Rule: users can optionally add axle units for vehicle configurations that allow it to the ASW table when applying for a STOW permit template
Test Case: TC-01 - Add axle units for crane - all terrain
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration is crane - all terrain.
Action: Select crane - all terrain power unit
Expected Result: Crane - all terrain configuration is selected

Action: View the ASW table controls for the selected power unit
Expected Result: Add axle unit option is visible for the power unit

Action: Click add axle unit for the power unit
Expected Result: A new axle unit row is added for the power unit

Rule: users can optionally add axle units for vehicle configurations that allow it to the ASW table when applying for a STOW permit template
Test Case: TC-02 - Add axle units for steering dolly
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration is truck tractor with steering dolly.
Action: Select truck tractor power unit with steering dolly trailer
Expected Result: Truck tractor with steering dolly configuration is selected

Action: View ASW table controls for both units
Expected Result: Add axle unit option is visible for steering dolly trailer

Action: Check ASW table controls for truck tractor power unit
Expected Result: Add axle unit option is not available for truck tractor power unit

Rule: users can optionally add axle units for vehicle configurations that allow it to the ASW table when applying for a STOW permit template
Test Case: TC-03 - Add axle units for dolly
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration is picker truck tractor with dolly.
Action: Select picker truck tractor power unit with dolly trailer
Expected Result: Picker truck tractor with dolly configuration is selected

Action: View ASW table controls for both units
Expected Result: Add axle unit option is visible for dolly trailer

Action: Check ASW table controls for picker truck tractor power unit
Expected Result: Add axle unit option is not available for picker truck tractor power unit

Rule: users can optionally remove axle units they have added to the ASW table
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration allows axle units.
Action: Add an axle unit entry to the ASW table
Expected Result: Axle unit entry is present in the ASW table

Action: Click remove on the added axle unit entry
Expected Result: Selected axle unit entry is removed from the ASW table

Action: Review ASW table row count after removal
Expected Result: Row count is decreased by one

Rule: Added axle unit rows are empty except for No. of Axles which defaults to 1 and Tire Size with defaults to 279.4 (11inches) when an axle unit is added to the ASW table
Test Case: TC-05 - Added axle unit row defaults and empty fields
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration allows axle units.
Action: Click add axle unit
Expected Result: A new axle unit row is added

Action: Check No. of Axles value in the new row
Expected Result: No. of Axles defaults to 1

Action: Check Tire Size value in the new row
Expected Result: Tire Size defaults to 279.4 (11 inches)

Action: Check axle spacing and weight fields in the new row
Expected Result: Axle spacing and weight fields are empty

Rule: users can hover on the add axle unit button to see a tooltip with information about adding axle units
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration allows axle units.
Action: Navigate to a section where add axle unit button is available
Expected Result: Add axle unit button is visible

Action: Hover on add axle unit button
Expected Result: Tooltip displays: Add Axle Unit

Action: Move cursor away from add axle unit button
Expected Result: Tooltip is dismissed

Rule: users can hover on the remove axle unit button to see a tooltip with information about adding axle units
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration allows axle units and an axle unit row exists.
Action: Add an axle unit row to make remove control available
Expected Result: Remove axle unit button is visible for the row

Action: Hover on remove axle unit button
Expected Result: Tooltip displays: Remove Axle Unit

Action: Move cursor away from remove axle unit button
Expected Result: Tooltip is dismissed

Rule: there is no limit to the number of axle units a user can add for a vehicle configuration that allows axle units
Test Case: TC-08 - Add multiple axle units without limit
Preconditions: User is logged in. Vehicle configuration allows axle units.
Action: Click add axle unit button 5 times
Expected Result: Five new axle unit rows are added

Action: Click add axle unit button 10 more times
Expected Result: Total axle unit row count increases by 10 with no hard stop

Action: Continue adding axle units
Expected Result: Each click continues to add a new axle unit row and no max limit validation is shown
